code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut prev = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = toks.len()
  while i < n
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        if not has_prev
          result = "#{v}"
          prev = v
          has_prev = true
        else if v != prev
          result = "#{result} #{v}"
          prev = v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
